`,(0,n.jsx)(o,{name:"use-mouse",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\r
import type { MouseEvent } from "react";\r
\r
export function useMouse<T extends HTMLElement = any>(options: { resetOnExit?: boolean } = { resetOnExit: false }) {\r
  const [position, setPosition] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 });\r
\r
  const ref = useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  const setMousePosition = (event: MouseEvent<HTMLElement>) => {\r
    if (ref.current) {\r
      const rect = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();\r
\r
      const x = Math.max(0, Math.round(event.pageX - rect.left - (window.pageXOffset || window.scrollX)));\r
\r
      const y = Math.max(0, Math.round(event.pageY - rect.top - (window.pageYOffset || window.scrollY)));\r
\r
      setPosition({ x, y });\r
    } else {\r
      setPosition({ x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY });\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const resetMousePosition = () => setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 });\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const element = ref?.current ? ref.current : document;\r
    element.addEventListener("mousemove", setMousePosition as any);\r
    if (options.resetOnExit) element.addEventListener("mouseleave", resetMousePosition as any);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      element.removeEventListener("mousemove", setMousePosition as any);\r
      if (options.resetOnExit) element.removeEventListener("mouseleave", resetMousePosition as any);\r
    };\r
  }, [ref, options]);\r
\r
  return { ref, ...position };\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-mouse.ts"})]})}function d(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,n.jsx)(u,{...t})}):u(t)}function E(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return w(k);})();
